{{CargoRelic
|name=Mendelssohn's Baton
|class_id=22519
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=02-21
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Feb 21, 1834 AD, Mendelssohn used a conducting baton for the first time in a performance.<br>In ancient Europe, people invented sign language as a method of command. As time passed, various methods of command such as tapping the floor with a cane also emerged. Finally, Mendelssohn, by chance, used a baton-shaped whalebone wrapped in leather and led a successful music performance as a conductor. The world's first conducting baton was born and gradually became a symbol of conductors.
|fame=71
|art=40
|fth=37
|civ=49
|tech=46
|ss1=Per Recruitment Incident completed, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +24<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50
|ss2=Per Recruitment Incident completed, Snail ATK +4<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +32<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50
|ss3=Per Recruitment Incident completed, Snail ATK +5<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +40<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50
|ss4=Per Recruitment Incident completed, Snail ATK +7<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +56<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50
|ss5=Per Recruitment Incident completed, Snail ATK +9<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50
|ss7=Per Recruitment Incident completed, Snail ATK +9<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Desertsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Desert Sanctum: Desert Sanctum, Glorium Cap +15%
|skill2=[[File:Desertsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Desert Sanctum: This Relic's FAME +10
}}
